title: Avatar config
description: Config file for avatars and animations.

$schema.description: Optional path or URI to this schema for editor validation (e.g. ./config.schema.json).

llm.description: List of named LLM configs. Each avatar references one by name via avatar.llm.ref.

scenes.description: List of scene/background definitions (2D images or HDRI environments).

conversations.description: Optional persistent conversations config. When present, conversations are stored in SQLite and survive restarts.

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file (e.g. ./data/conversations.sqlite).

type.description: Scene type: '2d' for a background image, 'hdri' for an environment map.

path.description: Path to the scene file (e.g. /data/scenes/forest.jpg or /data/scenes/studio.hdr).

memory.description: Optional long-term memory: SQLite + sqlite-vec. When present, relevant past exchanges are injected into the LLM context and new exchanges are stored.

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file (e.g. ./data/memory.sqlite).

embeddingModel.description: Embedding model name (e.g. nomic-embed-text for Ollama, text-embedding-3-small for OpenAI).

llmName.description: Name of the LLM config whose provider is used for embeddings. Defaults to the first LLM config.

topK.description: Number of relevant memories to inject into context.

llmEntry.description: Named LLM config. The 'name' is referenced by avatar.llm.ref. The 'type' selects the provider (ollama, openai, anthropic, local).

llmEntryOllama.description: Ollama LLM provider. Connects to a running Ollama instance via its OpenAI-compatible API.

name.description: Unique name for this LLM. Referenced by avatar.llm.ref.

llmEntryOpenAI.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM provider. Works with OpenAI, LM Studio, vLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible API.

name.description: Unique name for this LLM. Referenced by avatar.llm.ref.

url.description: Optional base URL for OpenAI-compatible APIs (e.g. http://localhost:1234/v1 for LM Studio). Omit for real OpenAI.

apiKey.description: API key. Can also be set via OPENAI_API_KEY env var.

llmEntryAnthropic.description: Anthropic LLM provider. Uses Claude models via the Anthropic API.

name.description: Unique name for this LLM. Referenced by avatar.llm.ref.

apiKey.description: API key. Can also be set via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.

llmEntryLocal.description: Local LLM via Transformers.js. Runs ONNX models in-process, no external service needed.

name.description: Unique name for this LLM. Referenced by avatar.llm.ref.

tts.description: List of named TTS configs. Each avatar references one by name via avatar.tts.ref.

ttsEntry.description: Named TTS config. The 'name' is referenced by avatar.tts.ref. The 'type' selects the provider (openai, elevenlabs, local, sirene).

ttsEntryOpenAI.description: OpenAI TTS provider. Uses OpenAI's text-to-speech API.

name.description: Unique name for this TTS. Referenced by avatar.tts.ref.

apiKey.description: API key. Can also be set via OPENAI_API_KEY env var.

voice.description: Voice name (e.g. alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer).

ttsEntryElevenLabs.description: ElevenLabs TTS provider. Uses ElevenLabs' text-to-speech API.

name.description: Unique name for this TTS. Referenced by avatar.tts.ref.

apiKey.description: API key. Can also be set via ELEVENLABS_API_KEY env var.

ttsEntryLocal.description: Local TTS via Transformers.js. Runs ONNX models in-process, no external service needed.

name.description: Unique name for this TTS. Referenced by avatar.tts.ref.

ttsEntrySirene.description: Sirene TTS provider. Routes to multiple backends (Kokoro, Piper, F5-TTS, etc.) via a Sirene instance.

name.description: Unique name for this TTS. Referenced by avatar.tts.ref.

url.description: URL to the VRMA file. Optional: defaults to /data/animations/{id}.vrma.

animations.description: Per-avatar animation settings. All fields optional.

available.description: IDs of animations available for this avatar. When omitted, all global animations are available.

idle.description: Animation ID to play as idle/rest loop after appearing.

appearing.description: Animation ID to play as intro when the avatar appears.

expressionMapping.description: Mapping from expression/emotion name to animation ID.

idlePool.description: Animation IDs for random idle behaviors (e.g. look around, yawn).

idleMinInterval.description: Minimum seconds between idle behaviors. Default 8.

idleMaxInterval.description: Maximum seconds between idle behaviors. Default 20.

scene.description: ID of the scene/background to use for this avatar. References scenes[].id.

outfits.description: Outfit variants. Each entry has its own VRM modelPath. One entry should have "default": true.

modelPath.description: URL to the VRM model for this outfit.

default.description: When true, this outfit is selected by default.

avatarLlm.description: LLM config for this avatar. Reference to a named LLM entry with optional per-avatar overrides.

ref.description: Name of the LLM config from the root llm array (e.g. 'ollama').

overrides.description: Per-avatar overrides: systemPrompt, model (overrides the LLM's default model for this avatar).

memory.description: When global memory is configured, set to false to disable memory for this avatar. Omit or true to enable.

avatarTtsRef.description: Reference to a root tts entry by ref. When omitted, no speech synthesis. Per-avatar overrides for voice, model, and speed.

ref.description: Name of the TTS config from the root tts array.

hintWords.description: Words/phrases to improve recognition (e.g. character names).

restartOnEndDelayMs.description: Delay in ms before restarting recognition after the browser ends a phrase, so the mic stays on longer (e.g. 1200).

expressions.description: Expression parsing: valid expression IDs and mapping from LLM emotion tags to those IDs.

valid.description: List of valid expression IDs (e.g. happy, sad, neutral). LLM tags matching these are used as-is.

emotionMapping.description: Map custom emotion names (e.g. smile, blush) to a valid expression ID.
